title: bidens pilosa f. calcicola
intro: Bidens pilosa f. calcicola, also known as the calcicolous bidens, is a variety of the Bidens pilosa plant, a type of plant that belongs to the aster family and is native to tropical regions. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Bidens pilosa f. calcicola include its use as a treatment for fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential in lowering cholesterol and blood sugar levels. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to enhance its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
